ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the supplier was created
Timestamp when the supplier was last updated
